windows-gfx1151.blocked_reason: MAJOR PROGRESS at 95ea9136. The memory_resource vendoring (jeff's insight) resolved the dual-STL blocker; the full GPU engine now builds all-clang-cl on gfx1151. Running gpu_data-ut then FOUND + FIXED a real GPU-correctness bug (committed): split.cu computed the split predicate as binIdx<<feature.Shift, which OVERFLOWS ui32 for a feature at high Shift (1-bit one-hot at Shift=31) with out-of-range binIdx -> spurious one-hot match; fix compares the extracted bin to binIdx directly (matches CPU; wave-agnostic; affects ALL platforms -> gfx90a/gfx1100 revalidate). gfx1151 GPU-VALIDATED: cuda_util-ut 48/48 + gpu_data-ut 20/20, both deterministic x2. REMAINING (blocks completed): methods-ut (histogram kernels) hits a clang-cl link quirk -- NKernel::MakeElementwiseOffsets is present in catboost-cuda-targets.lib with matching PEAU mangling yet unresolved at the ut-exe link (3 sibling dcg kernels resolve); full-app e2e not run. Build recipe + all Windows deltas in notes.md / agent_space/catboost.
